title: Private views of boards
excerpt: When working with large boards, it would be great to have private saved views. This feature would allow each team member to manage the board according to their individual preferences without interfering with others’ sett…

posts.author: Nicolas.G (Nicolas Goyon)
posts.cookedHtml:
When working with large boards, it would be great to have private saved views. This feature would allow each team member to manage the board according to their individual preferences without interfering with others’ settings, since everyone typically wants to customize their own views.

Additionally, it would be beneficial if a specific view could be “extracted” into a separate line or treated similarly to a standalone board. This capability would enable multiple distinct views, enhancing clarity and simplifying management of extensive boards.
